name: deadlock.io static API
description: Patch-versioned, fully-localized Deadlock game data extracted directly from the local game client.

endpoints.description: Build metadata, languages and entity counts.
Released heroes with abilities, weapon stats, tags, progression and base stats.
A single hero by slug.
A hero's web-ready 3D showcase model (GLB): the in-client hero-select model + animation.
Shop items by Weapon / Vitality / Spirit category and tier.
A single item by slug.
Every ability and item-ability with properties, scaling and the in-client tooltip card.
A single playable ability: tooltip card (Main/Alt stats, corner stats, status effects, per-tier upgrades), properties and scaling.
Map objectives, troopers, denizen camps and bosses with health and soul bounty.
Game-systems constants: damage-type colours, lanes, soul economy, Rejuvenator/Urn timings and skill-tier benchmarks.
Player-facing mechanic explainers.
A single mechanic.
Parsed patch notes with per-entity change targeting.
A single patch.
Client news surface and external feed entries.
Rank ladder, badges and leaderboard snapshots.
Supported client languages and site locales.
Exported web asset manifest (icons, portraits, badges, hero showcase models).
Data providers and how each surface is sourced.
Cross-entity relationship graph.

license: Game data is property of Valve. This project is an unofficial community tool.
